title.en: Interviewing Feliks Zemdegs on 3.47 WR Single

content.en:
Interviewing Feliks Zemdegs on 3.47 WR Single

采访菲利克斯关于3.47三速单次世界纪录

Interviewed by Cubing Encoded

http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zTE8owwAnoA

1. What was your initial reaction? Do you remember what you were doing and where did you hear the news? Did you believe it at first and were you disappointed or conflicted?

你最初的反应是什么？你还记得你在做什么以及在哪里听到这个消息？你最初是否相信它，你是失望还是矛盾？

I woke up in the morning to find out it had been broken. Initially when I saw a bunch of posts, I thought it might not have been real, because there have certainly been hoaxes, misscrambles, and fake solves in the past. I think it was completely natural that a 3.47 single in a 9.00 second average aroused suspicion. However, once I read a bit more, and saw the security camera footage as well as the reconstruction, I realized that it was completely legitimate. Mats Valk was sleeping in the bed next to me, and so I woke him up to tell him the news, he had the same reaction - didn't believe that it happened, and then took a look at the video and reconstruction.

我早上醒来发现它已被打破。我最初看到一堆帖子时我认为这可能不是真的，因为以前有过骗局，错打乱和假复原。我觉得平均9.00中的单次3.47引起了人们的怀疑是完全自然的。然而，直到我多读了点内容，并看到监控视频以及复盘，我意识到它完全符合规定。Mats Valk正在我旁边床上睡觉，所以我叫醒他告诉他这个消息，他有同样的反应 - 不相信它发生了，然后看了一下视频和复盘。

2. Did you know about YuSheng Du before this new WR?

在这个新的WR之前你对杜宇生有所了解吗？

I think I remember seeing his name in the list of China Championship finalists, but nothing more than that, to be honest. I'll certainly be following his results from this point onwards though!

我想我记得在中锦赛决赛名单中看到过他的名字，但老实说，仅此而已。不过我肯定会从现在开始开始关注他的成绩！

3. How surprised were you that a relatively unknown cuber got the WR? Did you expect it to be somebody else?

当一个相对不知名的魔友（注：对国外魔友来说）获得了WR，你有多惊讶？你有没有想到它会成为别人的？

With the frequency of competitions happening around the world and the number of top 100 solvers who compete each weekend, it was eventually going to be the case that a fast cuber got a sub 30 move solution and was able to execute it at a standard TPS. However, I don't think anyone expected a solve this fast, this soon.

随着世界各地比赛频率和每个周末比赛的世界前100名选手的数量的增加，最终必然会出现一个复原非常快的魔友，获得30步以内的解法并以正常的TPS完成复原。但是我没想到这么快就有人达到了这么短的时间。

4. What are your thoughts on the time itself? Did you expect such a large drop?

你对复原时间本身有什么看法？你有没有想过这么大的飞跃？

Nope. 没有。

5. Have you ever gotten faster than 3.47 at home before during practice? How about stackmat?

你曾经是否在练习时获得过比3.47快的成绩？以及在飞叠杯计时器上的成绩？

Maybe like 5-10 times ever, and perhaps only once or twice on stackmat.

可能有5到10次，也许只有一到两次在飞叠杯计时器上。

6. Are you impressed with the execution of the solve? Do you think you could have gone faster if you got that scramble?

你对他的解法执行印象深刻吗？ 如果你拿到这个打乱，你认为你可以更快吗？

Yep, the XXcross was really nice, and it seemed like the last two pairs were also really smooth. I tried the scramble before seeing the solution, and did a couple of different XXcross solutions, but neither of them led to the same continuation that Yusheng got - I wouldn't have built the extended cross in the same way.

是的，XXcross非常好，看起来最后两对F2L也非常顺利。我在看到解法前试下了这个打乱，做了几个不同的XXcross解法，但它们都没有造成和杜宇生同样的结果 - 我不会以同样的方式构造扩展十字。

7. How long do you think it's going to take for people to catch up to this WR?

你认为人们追上这个WR需要多久？

I imagine it won't be broken for at least 3-4 years, it's just such an insanely quick time.

我想至少它在3-4年内不会被打破，那是一个极端快的成绩。

8. Does this motivate you to set harder goals to get your WR back? Or are you not going to focus on the WR single anymore?

这是否会激励你设定更高目标来夺回你的WR？ 或者你不再专注于单次WR？

I think the WR is now at the stage that it shouldn't really act as a motivator for cubers, because you really just need an insane amount of luck in order to even have a chance of beating it, and that's not something that people can really influence.

我认为WR现在处于这样的阶段，它不应该作为魔友的真正激励因素，因为你真的需要极端好的运气才能有机会打破，这不是人们能真正操控的事。
